events.label: assistant
events.text: Diagnosis written to `/app/answer.json`: the fault is a mounting error — pressing force was driven through the rolling elements instead of the interference-fit race, which SKF/Timken guides flag as a direct cause of raceway brinelling/indentation. Since the asset is in-service, this is flagged `fail`/`high risk`, with recommended dismount, inspection, replacement, and fitter retraining.
